title: The Great Bridge Heist
cover_description: A dramatic crocodile clings to a single wooden plank, floating in a swamp, while the rest of the bridge lies in splinters beneath the water.
script:
[TITLE: The Great Bridge Heist]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] Behold, the mighty Crocodile, architect of doom, standing before the rickety old bridge that dares to span my swamp. [STING: villain_entrance]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Tonight, I shall remove it—plank by plank—and build a throne from its bones.
[CROC] [DELIVERY: smug] The villagers will wake to find their precious bridge... gone.
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident] First, the leftmost plank—easily pried with my mighty jaws. [STING: boing]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Wait. Why is the bridge tilting? That wasn’t in the plan.
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive] It’s fine. It’s *supposed* to do that.
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: tentative] Second plank—gently, now. The bridge is... wobbling like a jellyfish in a hurricane.
[CROC] [DELIVERY: scrambling] Not my fault! It’s *old*! Old things wobble!
[CROC] [DELIVERY: panicked] Oh no. The entire middle section just... sagged. That’s not wobbling. That’s *collapsing*.
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned] Third plank. The *last* plank. The bridge is now a seesaw, and I am the only one left on it.
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate] One. Small. Tug.
[CROC] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] ...The bridge is gone. The throne is gone. I am floating in the swamp. On a single plank. [STING: deflation]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: loud, outraged] [PUNCHLINE]I DID IT! I DESTROYED THE BRIDGE! ...Now how do I get back to shore?![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: villain_fail]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A dramatic crocodile clings to a single wooden plank, floating in a swamp, while the rest of the bridge lies in splinters beneath the water.]
[PREMISE: Villain dismantles bridge, strands self]
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy steals an entire bridge. He did not plan what happens next.
host_outro: Boomy is standing on an island he made himself. He is very proud.
